behavior_summary: Provides the examine ('U8P_LITHOS::look') description for the Lithos NPC and a multi-step interaction sequence for when the player 'uses' or talks to Lithos.
U8P_LITHOS::look is a short process that displays a single identification line ('Earth Titan') and then suspends.

U8P_LITHOS::use orchestrates a cutscene-like interaction: it optionally guards by map, plays music, places the avatar in stasis, recenters the camera, clears NPC combat flags, runs multiple animation/timing helper sequences (including U8P_LITHOS::lithosAnimSequence and several lower-level frame steppers), triggers camera quake/effects, sequences multi-line barks/dialogue with suspends between lines, and finally sets a persistent flag (lithosMet) to record the encounter.

Several small helper routines (U8P_LITHOS::func09B2, U8P_LITHOS::func0A14, U8P_LITHOS::func0AC8, U8P_LITHOS::func0B7C, U8P_LITHOS::func0C30, U8P_LITHOS::func0CCD, U8P_LITHOS::func0D7C, U8P_LITHOS::func0DAC, U8P_LITHOS::func0DDC) perform frame-by-frame visual updates and pacing using spawned timing helpers (FREE::func1C19, FREE::func29D8 etc.) and suspend to create visible animation timing.
notable_control_flow: Initial guard: U8P_LITHOS::use appears to check the NPC's map (Npc::getMap) and may skip the whole sequence if not on the expected map (guard to avoid running cutscene off-map).

Cutscene sequencing: U8P_LITHOS::use sets avatar stasis, may spawn a camera-follow helper, then repeatedly calls animation helper functions interleaved with spawn -> FREE::* timers and suspend statements to pace visuals and dialogue.

Camera and emphasis effects (playMusic, Camera::startQuake/stopQuake, spawned helper processes) are used at key beats; camera quake calls bracket some animation loops (e.g., U8P_LITHOS::func09B2, U8P_LITHOS::func0CCD).
End-of-interaction cleanup: U8P_LITHOS::use writes global flag lithosMet and uses finalization helpers (U8P_LITHOS::func0CCD / U8P_LITHOS::func0DDC) to reset frames and stop effects.
open_questions: What exact map id or map condition is checked by the Npc::getMap guard inside U8P_LITHOS::use (prevents running the sequence off the expected map)?
Are there alternate dialogue branches or player choices (menus/asks) reachable in other builds or data; the extracted script shows only linear barks with no menu/strcmp nodes.

Precise timing values and visual assets used by the frame indices (which animation names / sprite sheets correspond to frames like 0x0E, 0x16, 0x23) — these are engine-level resources not recoverable from the script alone.

main_function.name: U8P_LITHOS::look
main_function.purpose: Handle player 'U8P_LITHOS::look' / examine on Lithos by showing a short identifier line ('Earth Titan') and then suspending; serves as the in-world short description for the NPC.
entry_conditions: Invoked by the engine when the player examines (looks at) the Lithos NPC.

function_map.name: U8P_LITHOS::use
function_map.role: primary interaction / cutscene orchestrator (dialogue, camera, stasis, animations)

function_map.name: U8P_LITHOS::func0A14
function_map.role: short timing/frame helper for small step animations

function_map.name: U8P_LITHOS::func0B7C
function_map.role: low-level frame stepper (small loops and finalize frame)

function_map.name: U8P_LITHOS::lithosAnimSequence
function_map.role: high-level animation orchestrator that calls U8P_LITHOS::func0AC8, U8P_LITHOS::func0B7C, U8P_LITHOS::func0C30 with suspends

function_map.name: U8P_LITHOS::func0DDC
function_map.role: reset/pacing helper: resetRef, set frame 0x0E, spawn timer and suspend

internal_calls.purpose: Play a camera quake + run a short per-frame animation for emphasis early in the cutscene.
Run a finalization animation loop and stop camera quake near interaction end.
Invoke a composed animation sequence (U8P_LITHOS::func0AC8 -> U8P_LITHOS::func0B7C -> U8P_LITHOS::func0C30) to animate Lithos between dialogue beats.
Short timing/gesture step called between dialogue lines to vary pose.
Another short timing/gesture step for pose changes prior to some lines.
Run first low-level frame sequence of the animation trio.
Run second low-level frame sequence of the animation trio.
Run third low-level frame sequence of the animation trio.

external_calls.purpose: Start background or scene music for the interaction (music ID passed).
Disable avatar controls during the cutscene (flag 0/1).
Query NPC's map to decide whether to run the full interaction (map guard).
Spawn a camera-follow helper to recenter or follow the avatar for the cutscene.
Spawn short-lived timer/effect processes; used ubiquitously by animation helpers to pace frame changes and suspend.
Start camera shaking at the start of the emphasis animation.
Stop camera shaking after the emphasis animation loop.
Begin camera quake for the finalization effect, then stop it at end.
Clear the NPC's in-combat flag to ensure the cutscene runs without combat behavior interrupting.
Optionally reposition an NPC via pathfinding before or during the interaction (used conditionally).
Change the visual frame (pose) of the NPC/item to animate; called repeatedly by many helpers.
Spawn an auxiliary visual/timer helper used at certain animation starts.

writes.name: lithosMet
writes.likely_effect: Set to true when the U8P_LITHOS::use interaction completes to record that the player has met Lithos.

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: Provides the examine ('U8P_LITHOS::look') description for the Lithos NPC and a multi-step interaction sequence for when the player 'uses' or talks to Lithos.
